name: Pool
author: Poki
description: Pool puts your pooling skills to the ultimate test! Time to have some quick pool now! Start with a cue ball and a red billiard ball, and your goal is to sink the red ball into the hole in every tricky scenario. Calculate the angle, plan the route, aim carefully, and make the perfect shot! What will your best score be? How to play Pool? click and drag the cue stick to aim, release to shoot. Who created Pool? Pool is created by Fancade. Play their other games on Poki: Drive Mad , Stacktris , Monster Tracks , Monster Match , Recoil , Odd Bot Out , Speed King and Gobble ! How can I play Pool for free? You can play Pool for free on Poki. Can I play Pool on mobile devices and desktop? Pool can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
